decisions_made: Agent-first repos need AGENTS.md as a TOC for AI, not just README for humans
Harness is constraints + knowledge maps + quality gates, not limitations
Fix broken things first — failing tests are always priority one
107 automated checks define the quality baseline
Enforcement split: automated (compile, test, lint) vs manual (architecture review)
Long session protocol formalized as wave contract document
next_priorities: Integrate harness with night runner quality gates
Agent initiative system — agents find work, not just execute it
